description: Dalfox REST server mode allows unauthenticated remote code execution because API authentication is optional by default and attacker-controlled FoundAction/FoundActionShell fields from POST /scan are propagated into scan options and executed via exec.Command when a finding is triggered.

vulns.description: Server REST API key defaults to an empty string, so operators who start dalfox server without --api-key expose unauthenticated scan endpoints.
REST auth middleware is only registered when APIKey is non-empty, leaving POST /scan unauthenticated in the default configuration.
postScanHandler binds attacker-controlled JSON into model.Options and passes FoundAction/FoundActionShell to ScanFromAPI without stripping execution-control fields.
Initialize explicitly propagates FoundAction and FoundActionShell from caller options into the final scan options.
foundAction executes options.FoundAction through exec.Command(options.FoundActionShell, "-c", afterCmd), allowing arbitrary command execution when a finding is triggered.
